body:

You've also had time to reflect on what's truly important to you and to develop a clear sense of purpose. This means that you're not just learning new skills for the sake of learning – you're doing it to achieve specific goals and to create a better life for yourself. And that's a powerful motivation. So, don't let anyone tell you that you're too old to learn or to take on new challenges. You're not too old – you're just getting started.
